info.title: LocalAppVeyor
info.description: LocalAppVeyor allows one to run an appveyor.yml build script locally

commands.name: build
commands.description: Executes appveyor.yml's build jobs from specified repository

options.name: --dir
options.description:
Local repository directory where appveyor.yml sits. If not
specified current directory is used

options.name: --job
options.description:
Job to build. You can specify multiple jobs. Use 'jobs' command
to list them all

options.name: --skip
options.description:
Step to skip from the build pipeline step. You can specify
multiple steps.

commands.name: jobs
commands.description: List all build jobs available to execution

options.name: --dir
options.description:
Local repository directory where appveyor.yml sits. If not
specified current directory is used

commands.name: lint
commands.description: Validates appveyor.yml YAML configuration. It requires internet

options.name: --token
options.description:
Your AppVeyor account API token. If not specified it tries to
get it from LOCALAPPVEYOR_API_TOKEN environment variable. You
can find your API token here: https://ci.appveyor.com/api-token.

options.name: --dir
options.description:
Local repository directory where appveyor.yml sits. If not
specified current directory is used

commands.name: connection.
commands.description: Run 'LocalAppVeyor [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.
